data.title: NVIDIA's GB300 NVL72 GPU achieves 20x efficiency gains in agentic coding, setting new AI benchmark with AA-AgentPerf.
data.description: The latest GB300 NVL72 GPU by NVIDIA has demonstrated an impressive 20-fold increase in efficiency for agentic coding. This breakthrough sets a remarkable new standard for AI performance with the AA-AgentPerf benchmark.

data.title: New TALVEY® (talquetamab-tgvs) plus DARZALEX FASPRO® (daratumumab and hyaluronidase-fihj) data demonstrate the strength of a bispecific combination in earlier-line relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma
data.description: A recent study called MonumenTAL-3 revealed promising results for TALVEY® paired with DARZALEX FASPRO® either with or without pomalidomide. The study showed a progression-free survival rate of up to 81% and an overall survival rate of up to 89% after 24 months. This study marks the third positive outcome in a series of recent trials involving Johnson & Johnson's bispecific portfolio. MonumenTAL-3 is notable as the first Phase 3 trial to deliver such encouraging results.

data.title: Top features to focus on in in-house legal software: AI, document review, integration, enterprise security for better efficiency. (Read More)
data.description: Focus on essential features in internal legal software: prioritize AI functions, document examination, integration, and top-notch security for improved productivity and operational effectiveness. Explore further for more details.

data.title: AI tools such as Harvey are revolutionizing legal research, offering efficiency gains. Explore risks, benefits, and firms' adaptations.
data.description: Artificial intelligence (AI) tools such as Harvey are revolutionizing the landscape of legal research, offering significant efficiency improvements. These tools are promising to streamline processes in the legal industry, reducing the time and resources traditionally required for research. While the adoption of AI in legal research brings along its own set of risks and challenges, the benefits are undeniable. Firms are increasingly adapting to this technological shift in order to stay competitive and enhance their service delivery. Stay informed about the impact and changes AI tools like Harvey are bringing to the legal sector. (Read More for more information on the topic).

data.title: Hexaware Expands Presence in Gujarat with New Delivery Center at GIFT City
data.description: On June 13, 2026, Hexaware Technologies, a leading IT solutions and services company, inaugurated a new delivery center at Gujarat International Finance Tec-City (GIFT City) in India. This marks a significant expansion for the company, known for its global presence. The center will cater to the increasing demand for IT services and solutions, boosting the local economy and providing employment opportunities. Hexaware Technologies, listed on the National Stock Exchange (NSE) under the symbol HEXT, continues to strengthen its foothold in the industry with this strategic move.
SpaceX, Super Micro Computer, Micron And More: 5 Stocks Investors Couldn't Stop Buzzing About This Week

data.title: FREELANDER 8 Makes First Public Appearance Ahead of Official Abu Dhabi Launch
data.description: The debut of the FREELANDER 8 took place at the Abu Dhabi Investment Forum in Shanghai on June 11, 2026. The event showcased the latest model to a wide audience.

data.title: Blockworks buys Messari for $10M+, advancing in crypto analytics space consolidation.
data.description: Blockworks has completed the acquisition of Messari for a sum exceeding $10 million, reflecting a growing trend of consolidation within the cryptocurrency data and analytics sector.

data.title: Financial giant introduces blockchain platform for private shares, transforming pre-IPO investing for wealthy investors.
data.description: Citigroup has launched a blockchain marketplace that introduces tokenized private company shares, catering to institutional and affluent investors and revolutionizing pre-IPO investment opportunities. This move marks a significant shift in the investing landscape, allowing for easier access to shares in private companies.

data.title: Chances of Iran deal remain stable as June 30 deadline approaches, with active trading and SpaceX's rally lifting optimism.
data.description: Earlier this week, there was a notable increase in SpaceX's stock value, partly driven by indications of potential discussions resuming with Tehran. This development has sparked speculation on the possibility of a nuclear agreement being reached by June 30.

data.title: Jim Cramer Says SpaceX's Mega Debut Could Unleash A Wave Of AI Deals In The Week Ahead
data.description: Jim Cramer from CNBC cautioned about SpaceX's (NASDAQ: SPCX) remarkable entry into the market potentially leading to an increase in AI equity offerings, which could positively impact stock market performance in the upcoming week. After its first trading day, Elon Musk's SpaceX closed at $160.95 per share, giving the company a valuation of approximately $2.1 trillion, prompting comparisons with the largest public firms globally. The debut also attracted significant retail interest, evidenced by Robinhood (NASDAQ: HOOD) experiencing record platform traffic and temporary service interruptions. Cramer suggested that Anthropic, a developer of the Claude AI model, which recently filed confidentially for an IPO, might expedite its plans due to SpaceX's listing. He also hinted at Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) and Meta potentially entering the AI offering landscape.

data.title: KuCoin is yet to pay $2M to investor despite Seychelles court ruling tokens not abandoned. Investor plans to sue again.
data.description: A court in Seychelles ruled against KuCoin's decision to classify unwithdrawn tokens as abandoned and ordered the exchange to compensate a Swiss investor with over $2 million. The investor revealed that KuCoin has not yet made the payment, prompting him to pursue legal action once more.

data.title: AI revolutionizes legal document management for law firms globally, enhancing efficiency and knowledge retrieval in LDMS.
data.description: The integration of artificial intelligence (AI) is revolutionizing legal document management systems (LDMS) by significantly enhancing efficiency, governance, and knowledge retrieval within law firms globally. This transformation is yielding tangible benefits, with a notable increase in productivity, accuracy, and compliance across the industry. AI-driven LDMS solutions have been instrumental in streamlining operations and optimizing workflows, ultimately empowering legal professionals to work more effectively and deliver better outcomes for clients.

data.title: To Go Fast and Far: Why Africa's Businesses Are Rebuilding Technology in 2026
data.description: In Cape Town, South Africa, on June 13, 2026, Junkies Coder, a software engineering company originating from Africa, announced the launch of its Agentic AI & Enterprise Modernisation practice. This new unit is specifically designed to aid African enterprises in the efficient and effective deployment of AI agents. The initiative aims to ensure reliable deployment by implementing necessary processes and guidelines before integrating AI technologies.

data.title: Chainlink (LINK) utilizes CRE to enable next-gen prediction markets, powered by real-world data and robust infrastructure.
data.description: The Chainlink project has introduced the Chainlink Runtime Environment (CRE), which allows for the creation of automated prediction markets using real-world data and high-quality infrastructure. This advancement opens up new opportunities for utilizing reliable data in market predictions.

data.title: AESC and Prevalon Energy Sign 10+ GWh Strategic Supply Agreement to Support Global Energy Storage Growth
data.description: In Shanghai on June 13, 2026, AESC, a renowned provider of high-performance batteries and energy storage solutions, disclosed a significant partnership with Prevalon Energy, a collaborative effort between Mitsubishi Power Americas and EES. This collaboration involves a crucial supply agreement where AESC will be providing battery cells to Prevalon Energy.

data.title: Harvey adds 500 tasks to its Legal Agent Benchmark (LAB) for in-house legal teams, emphasizing contract negotiation.
data.description: Harvey has expanded its Legal Agent Benchmark (LAB) by adding 500 fresh tasks that concentrate on contract drafting, review, and negotiation for in-house legal teams.

data.title: In 2026, AI transforms litigation software with automation, smarter insights, and efficiency boost for legal teams. Read more.
data.description: Utilizing artificial intelligence, litigation management tools are revolutionizing the way cases are handled by providing automation, more intelligent insights, and increased efficiency for legal teams. This advanced technology is drastically improving the legal process by streamlining tasks and delivering significant benefits for legal professionals.

data.title: Netanyahu leads betting odds for Israel PM at 36.5% amid Swiss Brexit buzz, causing market volatility. Analysts assess policy spillovers.
data.description: The recent Swiss election has garnered international interest, causing fluctuations in markets as experts assess potential policy implications. Additionally, there has been significant speculation among traders regarding the next prime minister of Israel, with Netanyahu leading at 36.5%. This situation has generated heightened activity and uncertainty in financial markets.

data.title: Peru runoff sees victory with slim margin according to Polymarket odds.
data.description: In recent updates, it has been reported that the number of COVID-19 cases has reached over 5 million worldwide. Additionally, the death toll has surpassed 330,000. These numbers continue to rise as countries work towards controlling the spread of the virus through various measures such as social distancing and lockdowns. Health officials emphasize the importance of following guidelines to prevent further escalation of the pandemic. The situation remains fluid and global efforts are being made to develop a vaccine as quickly as possible to combat the virus.
